# Current React Learning Workspace

The React workspace is organized around continuing learning, not around exposing every backend capability as a peer workspace.
The composer can show a small `自动 · 当前任务` chip; task intent stays automatic unless the learner opens the chip to correct one turn.
The primary More menu keeps only `资料与来源`, `学习成果` and `设置`.
Group chat, news, tools and workflow diagnostics are experimental or developer-facing capabilities rather than primary learning navigation.
Settings focus on learning experience, material assistance, privacy and advanced options; upload, new-session creation and workspace navigation do not live inside Settings.
Controllers rehydrate server-owned durable run state so local UI state does not duplicate business workflow truth.
The ordinary interface should always make the next learning action clearer than the underlying run identifiers or provider configuration.
